lookalikes.prompt: A young man in his late 20s, with a warm medium-brown skin tone, subtle sun-kissed freckles across his nose and cheeks. His face is slightly more angular than oval, with a squarer jawline. He has long, dark brown, tightly coiled curly hair that reaches his shoulders, with a natural hairline. His eyes are wide-set and downturned, with striking light green irises and dark limbal rings, framed by thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows. His nose is Roman with a slightly narrow bridge and a pointed tip. His lips are full with a less defined cupid's bow. He sports a short, neatly trimmed dark beard and mustache. He is smiling broadly, throwing a tennis ball for a golden retriever in a sun-drenched backyard. Full-body shot. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
